headline: Advent Diamond and Northrop Grumman Set New Record for Diamond-based Solid-State Limiters
summary: Advent Diamond Inc. and Northrop Grumman have set a new performance record for solid state limiters made from engineered diamond. The device successfully handled more than 100 Watts of power while providing reliable protection for projected radio frequency (RF) applications.
